name: Architecture Diagram
content:
C4Context
    title Binance Portfolio Manager - System Architecture
    Person(user, "Binance User", "Views portfolio and executes trades")
    System(webapp, "Next.js Application", "Dashboard UI and backend server")
    System(server, "Backend Server", "Trading bot and API")
    System_Ext(binanceAPI, "Binance API", "Real-time market and portfolio data")
    Rel(user, webapp, "Interacts with dashboard")
    Rel(webapp, server, "API requests")
    Rel(server, binanceAPI, "Fetches data and executes trades")
